mapper.insert: insert into BSC_PF_BASICINFO (L_DECLARE_DATE, VC_PF_CODE, VC_FP_SNAME, VC_FP_NAME, VC_EXCHANGE, L_CURRENCY, VC_CLASSCODE1, VC_CLASSCODE2, VC_INVESTMETHOD, VC_INVESTDIRECTION, L_SALEBEGIN_DATE, L_SALEEND_DATE, L_FOUND_DATE, L_ENDDATE, L_DURATION, VC_DURATIONUNIT, EN_ISSAMT, EN_EXPTYIELD, EN_MINSUBAMT, L_PRETOTSHARE, L_PARVALUE, VC_SRSTATUS, VC_RECORDCOMPCODE, VC_TRUSTCOMPCODE, VC_MANACOMPCODE, VC_MANAGERNAME, VC_FPSN, L_ISVALID, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME ) values (#{lDeclareDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcPfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFpSname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFpName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcExchange,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lCurrency,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcClasscode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcClasscode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInvestmethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInvestdirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lSalebeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lSaleendDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lFoundDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEnddate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lDuration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcDurationunit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enIssamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enExptyield,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enMinsubamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lPretotshare,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lParvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcSrstatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcRecordcompcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcTrustcompcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcManacompcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcManagername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lIsvalid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.select: select L_DECLARE_DATE, VC_PF_CODE, VC_FP_SNAME, VC_FP_NAME, VC_EXCHANGE, L_CURRENCY, VC_CLASSCODE1, VC_CLASSCODE2, VC_INVESTMETHOD, VC_INVESTDIRECTION, L_SALEBEGIN_DATE, L_SALEEND_DATE, L_FOUND_DATE, L_ENDDATE, L_DURATION, VC_DURATIONUNIT, EN_ISSAMT, EN_EXPTYIELD, EN_MINSUBAMT, L_PRETOTSHARE, L_PARVALUE, VC_SRSTATUS, VC_RECORDCOMPCODE, VC_TRUSTCOMPCODE, VC_MANACOMPCODE, VC_MANAGERNAME, VC_FPSN, L_ISVALID, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BSC_PF_BASICINFO
